form.formComment: Comes off a 34 day let-up. At the latest run 7th of 13 at this track on March 5 over 1600m, 6 len behind Sithep with 55kg at $48.80. Before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 11 at Sonoda on January 14 over 1870m, 11 len behind Kitano Fern Hill with 57kg at $4.10. Beaten comfortably last time out but this suits.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Comes off a 34 day let-up. At the latest run 7th of 13 at this track on March 5 over 1600m, 6 len behind Sithep with 55kg at $48.80. Before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 11 at Sonoda on January 14 over 1870m, 11 len behind Kitano Fern Hill with 57kg at $4.10. Beaten comfortably last time out but this suits.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after nine months held ground to the line 2nd of 9 at Urawa on March 20 over 1500m, 1.0 len behind Original Pattern carrying 57kg at $1.90. Previously second-up favourite; scored a big 6 len win at Urawa May 30 over 1400m defeating Navy Cinderella carrying 54kg at $1.30. Sure to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Second-up. First-up after nine months held ground to the line 2nd of 9 at Urawa on March 20 over 1500m, 1.0 len behind Original Pattern carrying 57kg at $1.90. Previously second-up favourite; scored a big 6 len win at Urawa May 30 over 1400m defeating Navy Cinderella carrying 54kg at $1.30. Sure to run well.

form.formComment: Last start 4th of 7 at Funabashi on April 2 over 1200m, 7 len behind Ortus Glow with 54kg at $2.80. The start before that 6th of 13 at Urawa on February 25 over 1400m, 10 len behind Ange Luna with 54kg at $30.20. Well placed to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Last start 4th of 7 at Funabashi on April 2 over 1200m, 7 len behind Ortus Glow with 54kg at $2.80. The start before that 6th of 13 at Urawa on February 25 over 1400m, 10 len behind Ange Luna with 54kg at $30.20. Well placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months ran last of 9 at Funabashi on March 12 over 1200m, 13 len behind Make Sense carrying 56kg at $47.80. Previously second-up 6th of 10 at this track on August 7 over 1400m, 11 len behind Road Raising with 54kg at $6.10. Needs more time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Second run back. First-up after four months ran last of 9 at Funabashi on March 12 over 1200m, 13 len behind Make Sense carrying 56kg at $47.80. Previously second-up 6th of 10 at this track on August 7 over 1400m, 11 len behind Road Raising with 54kg at $6.10. Needs more time.

form.formComment: Returns from a 30-day let-up. At the latest run second last of 10 at Ohi on March 9 over 2000m, 27 len behind Saint Lazare carrying 56kg at $15.80. The race before that ran on from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track on February 3 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Summer Madness carrying 56kg at $7.80. Genuine chance this time around.

The race before that ran on from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track on February 3 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Summer Madness carrying 56kg at $7.80. Genuine chance this time around.

form.formComment: Most recently 4th of 12 at Urawa on March 17 over 1400m, 9 len behind Valbona carrying 55kg at $37.80. The race before that 11th of 13 at this track on March 5 over 1600m, 14 len behind Sithep with 55kg at $228.40. Prefer to watch at this stage.
